name: checkbox
description: A token-styled native <input type=checkbox> with a token check glyph (icon partial). Carries the checkbox role for free, POSTs `value` only when checked, binds via l:model on the native change event. Server-first replacement for the Lit island.
docs: Copies the checkbox partial to your JTE root at lievit/checkbox.jte, reached as @template.lievit.checkbox(name=...). The native checkbox POSTs `value` under `name` only when checked (zero JS); bind to a wire field with `model`. Carry a SAFE dynamic data-* (a filter key, a row id) on the native control via `dataAttrs` (Map<String,String>, each value HTML-escaped via Escape.htmlAttribute) -- the escaped channel a reactive-list filter checkbox needs instead of a hand-rolled $unsafe attrs. Requires the icon partial for the check glyph. The source is yours: edit freely.
